agent_verdicts.rationale: Independently verified 1.0/1.0 eval score (python3 eval/score.py). All 9 program links present (fallout, stasis, hackpad, blueprint, undercity, highway, solder, v3.hackclub.com/bin, v3.hackclub.com/onboard). All 8 required sections present (nav, hero, gallery, current-programs, past-programs, stats, get-help, community + footer). Marquee animation with @keyframes already included and scored 1.0 on scrolling_gallery — exceeded Phase 1 scope in the best possible way. CDN links correct. Brand tokens applied (#ec3750, #121217, #252429, Phantom Sans). Committed directly to main as instructed.
issues: None. Builder overdelivered by including full marquee animation in Phase 1.

**Instructions for next step:** Phase 2 should focus on visual polish only — hero decorative element, stats band gradient, card accent stripes, year badges on past cards, final content pass. Eval is already 1.0 so Phase 2 is pure aesthetic improvement. Archivist next, then Phase 2 builder.

agent_verdicts.rationale: Excellent research report. The Researcher visited the live site, identified all 8 critical gaps vs. the brief, extracted exact Hackclub brand tokens (colors #ec3750, fonts via css.hackclub.com CDN), visited 3 program pages (Highway, Undercity, OnBoard) to document aesthetic patterns, and provided a concrete CSS implementation for the scrolling gallery. Already scaffolded eval/score.py with 6 dimensions and weights. No calendar-time estimates. No web research gaps.
issues: None — research depth is sufficient to proceed directly to Strategy.

**Instructions for next step:** Strategist should produce 2 build phases: (1) scaffold + eval harness (eval/score.py already exists, so Phase 1 = HTML structure + brand tokens + all links), (2) polish — hero imagery/stats section + scrolling gallery animation + mobile responsiveness. Single-file delivery (index.html + style.css). Use exactly the CDN links documented in research.md.

agent_verdicts.rationale: Both hypotheses are well-specified and correctly scoped. H1 (capability_surface — full HTML scaffold) and H2 (capability_surface — polish + gallery animation) cover all sections from the brief. Phase 1 delivers ~82% of the eval score (required_sections + brand_compliance + program_links all at 1.0), Phase 2 finishes the remaining 15% (scrolling_gallery + full mobile). Each phase is a realistic one-PR amount of work. Deferred section contains ONLY real project photos that require human sourcing — no deferrable code was pushed to backlog.
issues: None. Growth dimension clearly tagged on both hypotheses. No calendar-time estimates. No hygiene-only hypotheses.

**Instructions for next step (Builder):** Implement H1 first per the GitHub issue. Use exactly the CDN links in research.md. All 9 program URLs must be present as literal href values. Run python eval/score.py before marking H1 complete — must reach ≥ 0.80 composite.
